overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a character with a large yellow-accented cargo backpack traversing a rocky mountain cliff edge alongside a turbulent river canyon. The environment features dramatic grey rock formations and rushing water below under overcast skies.

events.description: river canyon becomes visible to the right as character approaches the cliff edge

agents.ego_description: character with yellow-accented cargo rig walks steadily across uneven grey rocks toward the cliff edge

entered.detail: uneven grey stone terrain with large boulders and cracks
tall grey rock face with vertical striations and layered formations
deep canyon with turbulent water visible in the distance
hazy mountain peaks visible through the overcast sky

segments.scene_description: The character traverses a wide rocky plateau with grey stone terrain under an overcast sky. As the character approaches the cliff edge, a deep river canyon becomes visible to the right, revealing turbulent water far below.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cliffside trail overlooking rushing river

events.description: camera angle shifts downward to look at the turbulent river flowing through the canyon below

agents.ego_description: character walks carefully along the narrow cliff edge, briefly looking down at the rushing water below before continuing

entered.detail: rushing white-water river with visible rapids flowing through the canyon
opposite canyon wall covered in green moss and sparse vegetation

segments.scene_description: The character navigates a narrow cliffside trail with the turbulent river now prominently visible in the mid-ground. The camera briefly tilts down to observe the rushing white-water rapids before the character continues along the precarious path.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching narrow canyon passage with towering walls

events.description: path ahead narrows significantly into a tight canyon with mist visible in the distance

agents.ego_description: character continues along the winding cliff path toward the narrowing canyon ahead, with towering rock walls on both sides

entered.detail: constriction in the canyon with steep rock walls creating a narrow passage ahead
waterfall creating mist and spray visible in the distant canyon narrows

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a narrow canyon passage where the rock walls close in. The river remains visible but more distant to the right, while ahead, mist from a waterfall creates a hazy atmosphere in the canyon narrows. The left cliff wall looms closer as the path winds forward.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a rocky mountain plateau that gradually narrows into a misty canyon passage. It begins with the character traversing a wide expanse of grey stone under an overcast sky, moving toward a cliff edge where a deep river canyon first reveals itself to the right. As the character navigates a precarious cliffside trail, the camera briefly tilts down to capture the rushing white-water rapids far below before continuing forward. The scene then shifts as the path winds into a narrow passage where the rock walls close in and the river recedes into the distance. Finally, the environment becomes increasingly hazy as the character approaches the mist of a waterfall while the left cliff wall looms closer.
